text:
おつかれさま！　へっぽこぴーなりに
無事に任務完了できて、よかったね！

でも私をハラハラさせてるうちは
まだまだ、へっぽこぴーって
呼ばせてもらうわよ。

まあ今日のところは、アークスの中で
下から７番目くらいかなあ？

上から数えるほうが早くなるのは
いつのことやら……
もっと上を目指して頑張っ

Hey, nice work! I'm impressed that you fumbled
your way through that mission in one piece!
What'd you do, juggle scarves at them?

I'm still gonna keep calling you a clown
as long as you leave me in suspense.

Anyway, I guess today's work brings your
rank up to around... the seventh-worst ARKS
operative I've watched.

You wanna know when I'll start ranking you
from the best instead of from the worst? As
soon as you stop dragging those oversized feet!
